zh.Haverhill, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Co: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼諾福爾可哈維爾爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Theophilus Shatswell於1609年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可易普斯維其時，他的父親Sir John Shatswell35歲，母親Judith Dillingham31歲。他於1645年之前與Susanna Bosworth在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼諾福爾可哈維爾爾結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。他於1638年住在英國英格蘭素福爾可哈維爾爾。他於1642年登記服兵役。他於1659年被列為built a sawmill with daniel ladd on the spiggot river - for which each had to pay the town £5 a year。他去世於1663年8月17日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼諾福爾可哈維爾爾享年54歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州艾可哈維爾爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Theophilus Shatswell于1609年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可易普斯維其时，他的父亲Sir John Shatswell35岁，母亲Judith Dillingham31岁。他于1645年之前与Susanna Bosworth在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼諾福爾可哈維爾爾结婚。他们至少是4个女儿的父母。他于1638年住在英国英格兰素福爾可哈維爾爾。他于1642年登记服兵役。他于1659年被列为built a sawmill with daniel ladd on the spiggot river - for which each had to pay the town £5 a year。他去世于1663年8月17日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼諾福爾可哈維爾爾享年54岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州艾可哈維爾爾。

nameMeanings.name: Shatswell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: possibly a habitational name froma lost or unidentified place.

nameMeanings.name: Theophilus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name: the Latin form of the name of the addressee of St Luke's gospel and the Acts of the Apostles; also borne by various early saints. It is composed of the Greek words theos ‘god’ + philos ‘friend’, and was popular among early Christians because of its well-omened meaning ‘lover of God’ or ‘beloved by God’.

en.lifeSummary: When Theophilus Shatswell was born in 1609, in Ipswich, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Shatswell, was 35 and his mother, Judith Dillingham, was 31. He married Susanna Bosworth before 1645, in Haverhill, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. He lived in Haverhill, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom in 1638. He registered for military service in 1642. In 1659, at the age of 50, his occupation is listed as built a sawmill with daniel ladd on the spiggot river - for which each had to pay the town £5 a year. He died on 17 August 1663, in Haverhill, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 54, and was buried in Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Theophilus Shatswell est né en 1609, à Ipswich, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Shatswell, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Judith Dillingham, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Susanna Bosworth avant 1645, à Haverhill, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Il a vécu à Haverhill, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1638. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1642. En 1659, à l’âge de 50 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est built a sawmill with daniel ladd on the spiggot river - for which each had to pay the town £5 a year. Il est décédé le 17 août 1663, à Haverhill, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Theophilus Shatswell 1609 in Ipswich, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Shatswell 35 und seine Mutter Judith Dillingham 31. Er hat vor 1645 in Haverhill, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Susanna Bosworth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Töchter. 1638 hat er in Haverhill, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom gelebt. Er hat sich 1642 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1659, als er 50 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als built a sawmill with daniel ladd on the spiggot river - for which each had to pay the town £5 a year aufgeführt. Er starb am 17. August 1663 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Haverhill, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Theophilus Shatswell è nato il nel 1609 nel Ipswich, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John Shatswell, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Judith Dillingham, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Susanna Bosworth prima del 1645, nel Haverhill, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figlie. Vissuto a Haverhill, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1638. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1642. Nel 1659, all'età di 50 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come built a sawmill with daniel ladd on the spiggot river - for which each had to pay the town £5 a year. Morì il 17 agosto 1663, nel Haverhill, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Theophilus Shatswellが1609年にイギリスイギリススフォルクイプスウィチで生まれた時，父Sir John Shatswellは35歳，母Judith Dillinghamは31歳であった。1645年以前にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーノーフォルクヘイバーヒルでSusanna Bosworthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。彼は1638年にはイギリスイギリススフォルクヘイバーヒルに住んでいた。彼は1642年に兵役登録をした。1659年，50歳の時，職業はbuilt a sawmill with daniel ladd on the spiggot river - for which each had to pay the town £5 a yearと記録されている。彼は1663年8月17日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーノーフォルクヘイバーヒルで54歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州エセックスヘイバーヒルにて埋葬された。

ko.Ipswich, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Briti: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 이프스위치
ko.Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 이프스위치
ko.Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts Bay, Bri: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 하버힐
ko.Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay, Briti: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 이프스위치
ko.Haverhill, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Co: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 노르폴크 하버힐
ko.lifeSummary: Theophilus Shatswell(이)가 1609년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 이프스위치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Shatswell(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Judith Dillingham(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1645년 이전 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 노르폴크 하버힐에서 Susanna Bosworth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1638년도에 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 하버힐에서 살았다. 그는 1642년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1659년, 50세의 나이로 그의 직업은 built a sawmill with daniel ladd on the spiggot river - for which each had to pay the town £5 a year이었다. 그는 1663년 8월 17일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 노르폴크 하버힐에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 에세스 하버힐에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Theophilus Shatswell nasceu em 1609, em Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Shatswell, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Judith Dillingham, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Susanna Bosworth antes 1645, em Haverhill, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhas. Ele viveu em Haverhill, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1638. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1642. Em 1659, com 50 anos, sua profissão aparece como built a sawmill with daniel ladd on the spiggot river - for which each had to pay the town £5 a year. Ele faleceu em 17 de agosto de 1663, em Haverhill, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Theophilus Shatswell родился в 1609 г. в местности ипсвич, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Shatswell было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Judith Dillingham, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Susanna Bosworth перед 1645 г. в местности хавирилл, норфолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. Он жил в местности хавирилл, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в 1638 году. В 1642 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1659 году, в возрасте 50 лет, работал по профессии built a sawmill with daniel ladd on the spiggot river - for which each had to pay the town £5 a year. Он умер 17 августа 1663 г. в местности хавирилл, норфолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности хавирилл, эссекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Theophilus Shatswell nació en 1609, en Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Shatswell, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Judith Dillingham, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Susanna Bosworth antes de 1645, en Haverhill, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijas. Vivió en Haverhill, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1638. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1642. En 1659, a la edad de 50 años, su ocupación registrada era built a sawmill with daniel ladd on the spiggot river - for which each had to pay the town £5 a year. Murió el 17 de agosto de 1663, en Haverhill, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Haverhill, Essex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
